name: selfdex
description: Invoke Selfdex from a target project session for read-only planning and approval-gated Codex handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Call Selfdex from the current project session.
interface.longDescription: Selfdex reads the current project read-only, selects one bounded next task, freezes a contract, asks for approval before target writes, and records outcomes in the Selfdex command-center repository.
defaultPrompt: @selfdex read this project and choose the next safe task
@selfdex make a read-only plan for this repo
